purpose: Freeze the first exact coefficient already available in the actual lower-root channel mu = -1/2, namely the 3/8 coefficient from the rho^2 branch-motion expansion, while keeping separate the unresolved coefficient of the source term R_quad itself.

exact_channel_data.meaning: Second-order branch motion produces a nonzero coefficient in the lower obstruction channel.

what_this_certifies: The exact coefficient 3/8 in the branch-motion expansion at the lower root mu=-1/2.
The existence of a nonzero geometric lever in the actual obstruction channel.
what_this_does_not_certify: That the seed residual R_quad itself has coefficient 3/8.
That the source coefficient C_src is now known.
That the branch-motion coefficient equals the nonlinear source coefficient.
status_interpretation.why_it_still_matters: It proves that the repository already contains an exact coefficient in the correct obstruction channel, so future extraction of the source coefficient should be compared against a real geometric normal form rather than against a flat toy graph.
